MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-OCT-22-2008: Brenda Cruz Keith, counsel for plaintiffs Sioe Cheung and Wing Cheung, who are also present; Tiega Varlack, counsel by limited scope representation for defendant Cameron Conley, who is also present; Zippora Conley is present [default entered on 10/14/2008]
